title: Geofront Moon Stuff
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Thu Jan 10, 2013 3:21 pm The thing that comes out during 4th Impact... ...lies on the side now in Final. What is that thing?!

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jan 10, 2013 5:04 pm Black Moon or part of thereof?

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Thu Jan 10, 2013 8:17 pm Some horrible eldritch abomination? Some sort of spaceship/ark? A giant screw? The worlds largest piece of modern art? I have no freaking clue.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sun Jan 13, 2013 2:02 pm I don't understand what I see in this picture: Can anyone enlighten me? What is it? I thought it was earth but are we looking at it from earth? It's the moon? But it's awfully close...

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Sun Jan 13, 2013 2:11 pm Jinroh wrote: I don't understand what I see in this picture: Can anyone enlighten me? What is it? I thought it was earth but are we looking at it from earth? It's the moon? But it's awfully close...

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sun Jan 13, 2013 3:36 pm Ramiel² wrote: Moon which fills the sky and has his own atmosphere with no Gravitational Effect on the Earth - Not ok

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sun Jan 13, 2013 3:49 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sun Jan 13, 2013 4:51 pm The moon seems to be actually lying on earth itself... Did it fall from the sky? haha... The teeth are indeed disturbing, but there's another opening on the bottom. It's as if we missed something even bigger than the avorted third impact during the 14 years gap.

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Sun Jan 13, 2013 4:57 pm Well from what i can deduce this Rip in the Surface is what happened when the Hyper-Halo appeared above Tokyo 3 and the surface got that X-Rip. To deduce more out of it we have to see it in better quality. I honestly would be more satisfied with that what suppusodly is the moon beeing the contents that were elevated from shinjis impact in 2.0 just so it would make actually somewhat sense. The white ( dont even care why it had to be white) moon erupting and hovering as a sign of Work in progress - please resume later to finish impact. But do bad we actually see the black moon coming forth from the ground where NERV/Old-Tokyo3 is when 4I is happening so yeah. If it isnt a stilyzed Vision to show Shinji what has happened then this is really our beloved Trabant of our Planet, just fucking to close for comfort and with a new tan.

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Sun Jan 13, 2013 5:21 pm Reichu wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Sun Jan 13, 2013 5:30 pm K40s wrote: this, the inverted pyramid on the pylon, we see this when Kaworu shows Shinji what happened, but what is it? is the pyramid thing that was inside Geofront? Nerv HQ I believe? the thing that Shinji kicks during his tantrum after the dummy system takeover of Unit-01 when fighting Asuka in the infected Unit-03 in NME 2.22... if so how it ended up there and why it's upside down? or maybe it's not Nerv HQ but the pyramid pit outisde the Nerv HQ pyramid, only that unearthed from the bottom of Geofront and seen from the outside?? isn't that the main shaft to central dogma??

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Sun Jan 13, 2013 6:02 pm Ramiel² wrote: There was once a picture fanmade that tried to explain this but i dont have it here. The Pyramid upside down was beneath the Pyramid which embodied the Nerv HQ if i recall correctly and the shaft beneath it is the Shaft that leads to the Central Dogma. For whatever reasons it wasnt destroyed, probably due to AT field magic or something like that as it has a direct connection to the room of lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 13, 2013 6:07 pm I put together a couple of composites of the bizarre Geofront features from the Kaworu 3I exposition speech. A "open mouth with teeth", and an "iris" at the bottom: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Sun Jan 13, 2013 6:12 pm Reichu wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Sun Jan 13, 2013 6:23 pm I think Both your Collages shut be put somewhere easier to see. Either new Thread or maybe as added information in the Thread Explanation of 3.0. ..Everytime i see this images i want to know more what happened in those 14 Years...

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sun Jan 13, 2013 6:25 pm Well actually the Geofront would look like that: But I don't think it's the same in NME. It's probably the giant screw thingie. Considering it's supposed to be a spaceship of some sort, it's not really surprising.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sun Jan 13, 2013 6:26 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Sun Jan 13, 2013 7:20 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: No, it's the four corners that peeled up to the heavens at the end of 2.0. Only now there's a giant pole coming up from them. Which is why I think the diagram from the previous post involving the inverted pyramid can't be accurate; the podest is newly sprung up and wasn't there before. in the bottom of tallest pic that Reichu composited, you can see those upwards curling corners from a radically different angle, at the very bottom. Two of the sections are fully visible, with just a peek at a third at the bottom left.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sun Jan 13, 2013 7:30 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Sun Jan 13, 2013 7:33 pm wow i cant believe you guys manage to see that with a shitty camrip. cant wait to see what you dig up when the bd comes out. the teeth thing is...eerie. Btw what is failures of infinity ? are they the failed evolution from third impact of failed eva creations from nerv ?
summary:
[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Thu Jan 10, 2013 3:21 pm The thing that comes out during 4th Impact... ...lies on the side now in Final. What is that thing?!

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jan 10, 2013 5:04 pm Black Moon or part of thereof?

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Thu Jan 10, 2013 8:17 p

Article: Geofront Moon Stuff
 once a picture fanmade that tried to explain this but i dont have it here. The Pyramid upside down was beneath the Pyramid which embodied the Nerv HQ if i recall correctly and the shaft beneath it is the Shaft that leads to the Central Dogma. For whatever reasons it wasnt destroyed, probably due to AT field magic or something like that as it has a direct connection to the room of lilith.
